column1: Table: Major and Minor Greco-Roman and Eurasian Mystery Cults
Related PIE Myths: Proto-Indo-European themes (e.g., dying/reborn god, solar chariot, descent/ascent, trickster, monster-slayer, Great Mother, sacred king, psychopomp).
Online Source: Direct scholarly or reputable resource for each cult.

If you need further expansion (e.g., more minor deities, local variants, or a catalog of all known inscriptions/fragments for a specific cult), specify the tradition or area and I can provide a focused catalogue.
